'''鈭歡-ch-p''' ('''kagachap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:anchour|anchour]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ch-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:anchour|anchour]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-ch-p
|-
! Lemma
| kagachap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigachap|thigachap]] || [[word:jigachap|jigachap]] || [[word:shigachap|shigachap]] || [[word:kigachap|kigachap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugachap|thuthugachap]] || [[word:jujugachap|jujugachap]] || [[word:shushugachap|shushugachap]] || [[word:kukugachap|kukugachap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugachap|thugachap]] || [[word:jugachap|jugachap]] || [[word:shugachap|shugachap]] || [[word:kugachap|kugachap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugachap|thugachap]] || [[word:jugachap|jugachap]] || [[word:shugachap|shugachap]] || [[word:kugachap|kugachap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegachap|thegachap]] || [[word:jegachap|jegachap]] || [[word:shegachap|shegachap]] || [[word:kegachap|kegachap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogachap|thothogachap]] || [[word:jojogachap|jojogachap]] || [[word:shoshogachap|shoshogachap]] || [[word:kokogachap|kokogachap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogachap|thogachap]] || [[word:jogachap|jogachap]] || [[word:shogachap|shogachap]] || [[word:kogachap|kogachap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogachap|thogachap]] || [[word:jogachap|jogachap]] || [[word:shogachap|shogachap]] || [[word:kogachap|kogachap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gachap|th忙gachap]] || [[word:j忙gachap|j忙gachap]] || [[word:sh忙gachap|sh忙gachap]] || [[word:k忙gachap|k忙gachap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagachap|thathagachap]] || [[word:jajagachap|jajagachap]] || [[word:shashagachap|shashagachap]] || [[word:kakagachap|kakagachap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagachap|thagachap]] || [[word:jagachap|jagachap]] || [[word:shagachap|shagachap]] || [[word:kagachap|kagachap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagachap|thagachap]] || [[word:jagachap|jagachap]] || [[word:shagachap|shagachap]] || [[word:kagachap|kagachap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagachap|shagachap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagachap|goshagachap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagachap|gokishagachap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagachapn眉|shagachapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagachapnkn眉|goshagachapnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagachapn眉|gokishagachapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagachapsh毛|shagachapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagachapnksh毛|goshagachapnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagachapsh毛|gokishagachapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagachapro|shagachapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagachapnkro|goshagachapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagachapro|gokishagachapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagachapmu|shagachapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagachapnkmu|goshagachapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagachapmu|gokishagachapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagachapsher|shagachapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagachapnksher|goshagachapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagachapsher|gokishagachapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagachapng|shagachapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagachapnkng|goshagachapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagachapng|gokishagachapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagachapya|shagachapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagachapnkya|goshagachapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagachapya|gokishagachapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagachapyam|shagachapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagachapnkyam|goshagachapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagachapyam|gokishagachapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagachapn眉sh毛|shagachapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagachapnkn眉sh毛|goshagachapnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagachapn眉sh毛|gokishagachapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagachapn眉ro|shagachapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagachapnkn眉ro|goshagachapnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagachapn眉ro|gokishagachapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagachapn眉mu|shagachapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagachapnkn眉mu|goshagachapnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagachapn眉mu|gokishagachapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagachapsh毛n眉|shagachapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagachapnksh毛n眉|goshagachapnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagachapsh毛n眉|gokishagachapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagachapsh毛ro|shagachapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagachapnksh毛ro|goshagachapnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagachapsh毛ro|gokishagachapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagachapsh毛mu|shagachapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagachapnksh毛mu|goshagachapnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagachapsh毛mu|gokishagachapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagachapron眉|shagachapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagachapnkron眉|goshagachapnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagachapron眉|gokishagachapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagachaprosh毛|shagachaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagachapnkrosh毛|goshagachapnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagachaprosh毛|gokishagachaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagachapromu|shagachapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagachapnkromu|goshagachapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagachapromu|gokishagachapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagachapmun眉|shagachapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagachapnkmun眉|goshagachapnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagachapmun眉|gokishagachapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagachapmush毛|shagachapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagachapnkmush毛|goshagachapnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagachapmush毛|gokishagachapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagachapmuro|shagachapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagachapnkmuro|goshagachapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagachapmuro|gokishagachapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
